title: Top Active Emerging-Market ETF Sees Surge in Inflows as US Tariffs Struck Down
description: The largest actively-managed exchange-traded fund tracking emerging equities saw a surge in inflows after the Supreme Court’s strikedown of President Trump’s global tariffs, highlighting renewed demand for risk assets.
content: The largest actively-managed exchange-traded fund tracking emerging equities saw a surge in inflows after the Supreme Court’s strikedown of President Trump’s global tariffs, highlighting renewed demand for risk assets.
